canonical_definition: The task of evaluating a piece of code by assigning scores for correctness and clarity, providing suggestions for improvement, and generating a refined version of the code.
papers: AlchemistCoder: Harmonizing and Eliciting Code Capability by Hindsight Tuning on Multi-source Data
StackEval: Benchmarking LLMs in Coding Assistance
